raw_consumer_statement: Citi Mastercard called me on XX/XX/XXXX to ask about suspicious charges to my account, charges made at businesses in XXXX XXXX  area. At the time I had been working in XXXX XXXX  since XX/XX/XXXX. I told them at that time to cancel my credit card, the only thing I had charged to it in years was my streaming services, less than {$20.00} a month. I then received a bill for {$450.00} charged at XXXX XXXX  area businesses on XX/XX/XXXX. I am still in XXXX and havent been back to XXXX On XX/XX/XXXX I spoke to XXXX, XXXX  XXXX the XXXX XXXX who told me to ignore the bill. I then received a call from collections on about XX/XX/XXXX. I spoke with XXXX  in the fraud department on XX/XX/XXXX who put me on hold for XXXX minutes until I hung up. I asked on both days if there were any cards open in my name and they said no but they also have XXXX card numbers for me. I asked them to close anything in my name. I do not want to pay someone elses bill and I dont want my credit score affected. I dont trust them to not send out more cards in my name.
